meta.note: Routes fixed weekly DCA capital dynamically into the universe asset closest to its latest weekly bullish order block. Each week: sells out of any held position that has closed 20% or more below the price it was last bought at (stop-loss); sells a position that's up 10%+ from its last buy price if it then pulls back 15%+ from its post-purchase high (trailing stop, protects profits); and skips a candidate for that week's buy if it already exceeds 15% of the strategy's portfolio value, routing capital to the next-best opportunity instead.
